docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MHAMOOD MOHOMED AND DEFENDANT SAHAR TAWFIK. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED JUL-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAWFIK, SAHAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHOMED, MHAMOOD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TAWFIK, SAHAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,400.00 FILED BY MOHOMED, MHAMOOD AS TO DEFENDANT TAWFIK, SAHAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
